overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a dark fantasy video game showing a character in a long coat and hat exploring a dimly lit gothic library interior. The character walks through a grand hall lined with towering wooden bookshelves scattered with papers, then discovers and climbs a hidden ladder within a large carved cabinet.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic library hall with towering bookshelves and scattered papers

events.description: character turns right toward the illuminated wooden cabinet with the hidden ladder

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dimly lit library between tall bookshelves, approaching a distant archway and turning toward a warm light source

entered.detail: towering dark wood bookshelves lining both sides of the hall, reaching toward the high ceiling
heavy wooden tables scattered throughout the library with books and objects on top
loose papers and documents strewn across the wooden floor planks
decorative stone archway at the end of the hall with intricate carvings

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow gothic library corridor flanked by towering wooden bookshelves. The floor is littered with scattered papers, and heavy wooden tables sit between the shelves. The lighting is dim and cool-toned with blue-purple hues. The character progresses forward, then turns toward a warm light emanating from a large carved cabinet on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical ladder shaft within library cabinet

events.description: character interacts with the cabinet to reveal a hidden ladder and begins climbing upward

agents.ego_description: climbing a wooden ladder upward through a narrow dark shaft, moving from the library floor toward an upper level

entered.detail: tall wooden ladder extending vertically upward through a narrow shaft in the cabinet
dark wooden walls of the narrow vertical shaft enclosing the ladder on both sides
shadowy ceiling high above with wooden beams barely visible in the darkness

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the large carved wooden cabinet and pulls down a hidden ladder. The camera follows as the character ascends through a narrow vertical shaft, leaving the main library hall behind. The lighting shifts to a warmer tone near the candelabra at the entrance, then becomes darker as the character climbs higher into the shadowy shaft.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dim gothic library that transitions from a wide, cool-toned corridor into a narrow, shadowy vertical shaft. It begins with the character walking through a narrow hall flanked by towering wooden bookshelves and tables, where the floor is littered with scattered papers under blue-purple lighting. As the character progresses, the camera turns toward a warm glow emanating from a large carved cabinet on the right. The scene then shifts as the character pulls down a hidden ladder and begins to ascend, leaving the main library hall behind. The lighting transitions from the warm flicker of a candelabra at the entrance to deep shadows as the camera follows the character higher into the dark shaft.
